response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the initial segment (00:00-04:02) as a conversational interlude with no music. 2. Identified the start of the musical performance at 04:02. 3. Used the on-screen text to identify the song title as '言って。' and the original artist/composer as 'n-buna'. 4. Performed a search for the lyrics of '言って。' by n-buna. 5. Compiled the lyrics in both original Japanese and English translation to populate the scene JSON.
response.global_summary: A video segment featuring a conversation between two VTubers followed by a musical performance of the song '言って。' by n-buna, featuring three VTubers on stage.

scenes.description: Two VTubers are engaged in a casual conversation about payments, taxes, and surprise arrangements for a birthday event.
Three VTubers perform a choreographed dance and singing routine to the song '言って。'. The on-screen text identifies the song and the original composer/lyricist n-buna.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
言って。

あのね、私実は気付いてるの
ほら、君が言ったこと
あまり考えたいと思えなくて
忘れてたんだけど
盲目的に盲動的に妄想的に生きて
衝動的な焦燥的な消極的なままじゃ
駄目だったんだ
きっと、人生最後の日を前に思うのだろう
全部、全部言い足りなくて惜しいけど
あぁ、いつか人生最後の日、
君がいないことを
もっと、もっと、もっと
もっと、ちゃんと言って

あのね、空が青いのって
どうやって伝えればいいんだろうね
夜の雲が高いのって
どうすれば君もわかるんだろう
言って

あのね、私実はわかってるの
もう君が逝ったこと
あのね、わからず屋って言うんだろうね
忘れたいんだけど
もっとちゃんと言ってよ
忘れないようメモにしてよ
明日十時にホームで待ち合わせとかしよう。
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Say it.

Hey, I actually realized it
Look, what you said
I didn't really want to think about it
So I'd forgotten about it
Living blindly, rashly, delusionally
Impulsively, impatiently, passively—that wouldn't do
Surely, I'll think about it before the last day of my life
Though it's a shame that everything, everything was left unsaid
Ah, the last day of my life, someday
The fact that you don't exist
Please say it, more, more, more
Say it clearly

Hey, the sky is blue
How should I tell you?
The night clouds are high
How can I make you understand too?
Say it.

Hey, I actually know
That you've passed away
Hey, you'd call me stubborn, right?
I want to forget it
Please say it more clearly
Make a memo so I won't forget
Let's agree to meet at the platform at 10 tomorrow.
